STRUGGLER-APOSTLE_SLAYER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal {Bonus:diff()} additional damage to large enemies.
STRUGGLER-APOSTLE_SLAYER.title: Apostle Slayer
STRUGGLER-BANDAGE_WRAP.title: Bandage Wrap
STRUGGLER-BERSERKER_ARMOR.title: Berserker Armor
STRUGGLER-BERSERKERS_ROAR.description: Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP. If you have [gold]Berserk[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} cards and gain {Energy:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold].
STRUGGLER-BERSERKERS_ROAR.title: Berserker's Roar
STRUGGLER-BELT_FEED.description: If you have 0 [gold]Ammo[/gold] at the start of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Ammo[/gold].
STRUGGLER-BELT_FEED.title: Belt Feed
STRUGGLER-BLOOD_AND_IRON.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain additional [gold]Block[/gold] based on missing HP.
STRUGGLER-BLOOD_AND_IRON.title: Blood and Iron
STRUGGLER-BLOODLUST.description: The first time you enter [gold]Berserk[/gold] each combat, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
STRUGGLER-BLOODLUST.title: Bloodlust
STRUGGLER-BLOOD_SPRAY.title: Blood Spray
STRUGGLER-BRANDS_REVENGE.description: Whenever you take unblocked attack damage, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to the attacker.
STRUGGLER-BRANDS_REVENGE.title: Brand's Revenge
STRUGGLER-CANNON_RECOIL.description: Deal {Primary:diff()} damage. Deal {Secondary:diff()} damage to another enemy. Lose {Recoil:diff()} HP. Consumes 1 [gold]Ammo[/gold].
STRUGGLER-CANNON_RECOIL.title: Cannon Recoil
STRUGGLER-CANNON_SHOT.title: Cannon Shot
STRUGGLER-CONTEMPT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deals {StruggleBonus:diff()} additional damage per [gold]Struggle[/gold] stack.
STRUGGLER-CONTEMPT.title: Contempt
STRUGGLER-CROSSBOW_VOLLEY.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times to random enemies. Consumes 1 [gold]Ammo[/gold].
STRUGGLER-CROSSBOW_VOLLEY.title: Crossbow Volley
STRUGGLER-DEFEND.title: Defend
STRUGGLER-DOWNWARD_STRIKE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Double damage if enemy is below 30% HP.
STRUGGLER-DOWNWARD_STRIKE.title: Downward Strike
STRUGGLER-DRAGONSLAYER.title: Dragonslayer
STRUGGLER-DRAGONSLAYERS_CHARGE.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Costs 0 [gold]Energy[/gold] if you have played 2 or more Attacks this turn.
STRUGGLER-DRAGONSLAYERS_CHARGE.title: Dragon Slayer's Charge
STRUGGLER-DRAGONSLAYERS_LAMENT.title: Dragonslayer's Lament
STRUGGLER-ENDURE.title: Endure
STRUGGLER-EXECUTION.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal {ExecuteBonus:diff()} additional damage if the enemy is below {HpThreshold:diff()}% HP.
STRUGGLER-EXECUTION.title: Execution
STRUGGLER-FERAL_SWIPE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deals {BerserkBonus:diff()} additional damage while you have [gold]Berserk[/gold].
STRUGGLER-FERAL_SWIPE.title: Feral Swipe
STRUGGLER-GRINDSTONE.title: Grindstone
STRUGGLER-GUNPOWDER_LOAD.title: Gunpowder Load
STRUGGLER-HATRED.description: Whenever you kill an enemy, gain {HatredPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
STRUGGLER-HATRED.title: Hatred
STRUGGLER-HUNDRED_MAN_SLAYER.title: Hundred-Man Slayer
STRUGGLER-IRON_SALVO.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice if you have spent [gold]Ammo[/gold] this turn.
STRUGGLER-IRON_SALVO.title: Iron Salvo
STRUGGLER-IRON_THORNS.description: At the end of your turn, deal damage equal to your [gold]Struggle[/gold] stacks to ALL enemies.
STRUGGLER-IRON_THORNS.title: Iron Thorns
STRUGGLER-MINI_BOMB.title: Mini Bomb
STRUGGLER-OVERHEAD_SMASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy has [gold]Block[/gold], deal {Bonus:diff()} additional damage.
STRUGGLER-OVERHEAD_SMASH.title: Overhead Smash
STRUGGLER-PAIN_MIRROR.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. At the end of your turn, enemies take damage equal to half the HP you lost this turn.
STRUGGLER-PAIN_MIRROR.title: Pain Mirror
STRUGGLER-PHANTOM_PAIN.title: Phantom Pain
STRUGGLER-POWDER_KEG.description: The next time you spend [gold]Ammo[/gold] this turn, gain 2 [gold]Ammo[/gold].
STRUGGLER-POWDER_KEG.title: Powder Keg
STRUGGLER-REGAIN_CONTROL.title: Regain Control
STRUGGLER-RELENTLESS_SWING.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Permanently increase this card's damage by {Growth:diff()} this combat.
STRUGGLER-RELENTLESS_SWING.title: Relentless Swing
STRUGGLER-RIPOSTE.title: Riposte
STRUGGLER-SCATTERSHOT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. If you have [gold]Ammo[/gold], consume 1 to repeat the attack.
STRUGGLER-SCATTERSHOT.title: Scattershot
STRUGGLER-SHOULDER_CHECK.title: Shoulder Check
STRUGGLER-SPIN_ATTACK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Gain 1 [gold]Struggle[/gold] per enemy hit.
STRUGGLER-SPIN_ATTACK.title: Spin Attack
STRUGGLER-STRIKE.title: Strike
STRUGGLER-STRUGGLERS_WILL.description: Whenever you take unblocked attack damage, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to damage taken.
STRUGGLER-STRUGGLERS_WILL.title: Struggler's Will
STRUGGLER-SURVIVORS_INSTINCT.title: Survivor's Instinct
STRUGGLER-THROWING_KNIFE.title: Throwing Knife
STRUGGLER-WIDE_GUARD.title: Wide Guard
STRUGGLER-WHIRLWIND_CUT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Hits twice if this is your 3rd or later Attack played this turn.
STRUGGLER-WHIRLWIND_CUT.title: Whirlwind Cut
STRUGGLER-CLEAVE.title: Cleave
